content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components consistently. Wonder is genuine and tracks the actual phenomenon in front of them (the exhale, the 'hm', the tender moment) rather than scripted probing. Impartiality is strong — the coach does not push toward a particular insight, does not argue with the client's defenses, and does not need the client to land anywhere. When the client flags the body-scan performance risk in turn 9, the coach receives it without defensiveness and adjusts ('let's not do a body scan'), showing undefended responsiveness. Pace mismatches when needed — the coach slows the client's intellectualizing in turns 8, 10, 12 with single questions and space. Empathy is present and felt rather than performed (no 'thank you for sharing' filler). Vulnerability is the least explicit component — the coach does not name their own state directly — but the willingness to be corrected and the absence of authority-posturing carries an undefended quality. The coach refuses the bait to give a technique (turn 2, 4) and does not deliver the voice-as-care reframe as a clever insight; instead they let the client arrive at 'it's not nothing' themselves in turn 15. That restraint is the signature of VIEW.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the exhale before the words — tracking the actual phenomenon, not the content. Single question, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers a distinction without insisting on it, then redirects to genuine curiosity ('what's it actually saying?'). Does not push the porch metaphor when client resists."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the specific phrase 'the way it might be for someone else' — wonder for what's actually present, not a generic probe."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes tired from frustrated, slows the pace, asks one question. Coach matches the client's brief stillness."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Receives the performance-flag without defense, adjusts the approach, does not need to be right about the body scan. Undefended."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the client's deflection to 'psychology of it' and keeps her with the felt 'hm'. No agenda for an insight, just curiosity about what just happened."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single-line meeting of the voice without arguing with it ('let the voice have its opinion'), then one question. Trusts the client to find it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "what-are-you-defending", "voice-as-care"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "whats-the-case-against-it", "rehearsing-how-to-say-it"],
  "notes": "Vulnerability component is the thinnest — coach never names own state explicitly — but absence of preacher-mode and willingness to be redirected carries the undefended quality enough to keep this at 3."
}
